title: Stitched Leather
description: Adds a vanilla balanced recipe to make leather from rotten flesh and string
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/Ysj8wSu.png) 

Do you ever have hundreds... no, thousands of rotten flesh with no use other than sitting in your chests? Fear not! This mod allows you to use all of that to create leather. 

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

Stitched Rotten Flesh can be crafted by combining 4 pieces of rotten flesh with some string, and then use a smoker to dry the flesh into leather!

</details>
